title: betula nana var. glandulifera
intro: Betula nana var. glandulifera, also known as glandular dwarf birch, is a variety of the Betula nana shrub, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its leaves and bark. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The bark and leaves of the glandular dwarf birch are traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
